benefits.description: No negative interaction noticed between GLP-1 and Kratom; no reduction in Kratom use attributed to Tirzepatide specifically

protocol_notes: Has used Kratom on and off since 2010, mostly continuous use. Takes 1 teaspoon in the morning and 1 in the afternoon, occasionally a third. Liver levels have never been elevated. Has been on Tirzepatide since April 2024, currently bumped to 15mg due to a long-term weight loss stall. Also takes Vyvanse for ADHD — noticed reduced Kratom use on Vyvanse days but not from the GLP-1. Plans to potentially stack Retatrutide if current Tirz dose doesn't break stall.
